user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new survey, so that I can collect feedback from employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen; When I click Add new survey; Then I can create and configure a new survey

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search surveys by period and status, so that I can quickly find relevant surveys.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen; When I set a Period (From/To) and Status and click Search; Then only matching surveys are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter surveys by status such as Pending Approval, Published, or Completed, so that I can focus on surveys in a particular state.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen; When I select a Status from the dropdown; Then the list reflects surveys with that status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset my search filters, so that I can return to the full survey list.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Survey List screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view survey details including title, start/end dates, anonymity, created by, published date, applicability, and status, so that I can review each survey at a glance.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen; When the list loads; Then each survey shows its Title, Start date, End date, Anonymous survey flag, Created by, Published date, Applicability, and Status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open a survey via the View task action, so that I can inspect its configuration and results.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen; When I click View for a survey; Then the survey details open

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the survey list and page through results, so that I can see the latest data across many surveys.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey List screen with paginated results; When I click Refresh or navigate pages; Then the list updates and shows the requested page
